name: KRAKacquisition Corp
summary: KRAKacquisition Corp (KRAQ) is a blank check special purpose acquisition company (SPAC) incorporated in the Cayman Islands with no operating history or revenues. Its business objective is to identify and complete an initial Business Combination, with a focus on the blockchain, digital asset, and broader financial technology sectors. Co-founded by Payward, Inc. (d/b/a Kraken), Natural Capital Sponsor I LLC, and Tribe Capital Management, LLC, the company raised funds via an Initial Public Offering and holds proceeds in a Trust Account.
